line_map.best_image_by_CONTENT: no potato image in this week's folder (reused week1 potato.png)

line_map.line: The hat is on the ant! (the ant?!) The ant is in the hat!
The hat is on the cat! (the cat?!) The cat is in the hat!
The hat is on Sam! (it's Sam!) Sam is in the hat!
Who is in the hat? The ant is in the hat!

generate.line: The hat is on the ant! (the ant?!)
generate.mj_prompt: the same brown felt fedora hat sitting alone on the floor with no ant visible anywhere, mysterious and funny, a tiny black ant is nowhere to be seen — completely hidden underneath, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: ant is fully visible next to/under the hat brim instead of vanished — breaks the 'funny mystery' beat where only a hat is seen
only one doll figure present; spec requires both Sam and Segina leaning in curious alongside the cat
wrong_art.fix: reroll — mj_prompt: a felt hat sitting still on the floor with a tiny muffled squiggle above it, a tabby cat, a small wooden peg doll boy in blue dungarees AND a peg doll girl with black pigtails in a red dress both leaning in curious, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: five different hat designs used across the same one-hat story (brown felt fedora, teal bowler, tan woven sunhat, olive fuzzy fedora, dark bowler) — breaks prop continuity for a book whose entire plot is about ONE hat
wrong_art.fix: reroll hat-on-cat.png, hat-on-sam.png, hat-still.png and potato-hat.png to all feature the same brown felt fedora shown in hat.png
